# localthink-mcp

> Local Ollama-backed MCP server for Claude Code. 49 tools that offload file queries, compression, code navigation, execution filters, and session management to a local LLM — ~30x token savings vs loading files directly into context. All inference is local; no data leaves the machine.

## Why use this

When Claude reads a large file to answer a question, the full file loads into context — expensive and slow. localthink-mcp routes those queries through a local Ollama model instead. The answer comes back as a compact response (100-200 tokens) rather than the raw file (thousands of tokens).

Benchmarked result: **16 KB file query = ~134 tokens via localthink vs ~4,100 tokens via direct Read. ~30x savings.**

Three model tiers route work to the right-sized model automatically:
- **MAIN** — deep ops: summarize, answer, audit, pipeline, run_tests
- **FAST** — lightweight ops: classify, outline, symbols, translate, schema_infer
- **TINY** — instant ops: gate, trivial classification

## Installation

```bash
# 1. Pull models for your hardware (example: 10-12 GB VRAM — Tier E)
ollama pull qwen2.5:14b-instruct-q4_K_M
ollama pull qwen2.5:7b-instruct-q4_K_M
ollama pull qwen2.5:3b

# 2. Register with Claude Code — models set inline
claude mcp add localthink \
  --env OLLAMA_MODEL="qwen2.5:14b-instruct-q4_K_M" \
  --env OLLAMA_FAST_MODEL="qwen2.5:7b-instruct-q4_K_M" \
  --env OLLAMA_TINY_MODEL="qwen2.5:3b" \
  -- uvx localthink-mcp

# Windows:
# claude mcp add --transport stdio localthink ^
#   --env OLLAMA_MODEL="qwen2.5:14b-instruct-q4_K_M" ^
#   --env OLLAMA_FAST_MODEL="qwen2.5:7b-instruct-q4_K_M" ^
#   --env OLLAMA_TINY_MODEL="qwen2.5:3b" ^
#   -- cmd /c uvx localthink-mcp

# 3. Set CLAUDE.md instruction tier
cp -r claude-md/ ~/.claude/localthink/
python ~/.claude/localthink/set-tier.py full

# 4. Verify
claude mcp list   # localthink → Connected
```

See SETUP.md for per-hardware pull commands across all tiers (CPU through 48 GB+ GPU).

## CLAUDE.md tier system

Three instruction tiers inject directly into CLAUDE.md — no file editing:

| Tier | Lines | Tools | Best for |
|------|-------|-------|----------|
| full | ~60 | All 49 | Complex projects, new codebases |
| half | ~35 | ~22 | Daily dev: file nav + CI filters |
| quarter | ~15 | ~7 | Minimal: just prevent big-file loads |

Switch: `python ~/.claude/localthink/set-tier.py [full|half|quarter]`

## Configuration

Call `local_config()` from Claude Code to open the settings GUI — all 21 settings, 5 tabs, no file editing.

Key env vars (can also be set via GUI):
- `OLLAMA_BASE_URL` — default: `http://localhost:11434`
- `OLLAMA_MODEL` — MAIN model (deep ops)
- `OLLAMA_FAST_MODEL` — FAST model (lightweight ops). Default: same as MODEL
- `OLLAMA_TINY_MODEL` — TINY model (instant ops). Default: same as FAST
- `LOCALTHINK_TIMEOUT` — inference timeout seconds (default: 360)
- `LOCALTHINK_FAST_TIMEOUT` — fast model timeout (default: 180)
- `LOCALTHINK_TINY_TIMEOUT` — tiny model timeout (default: 60)
- `LOCALTHINK_MAX_CONCURRENCY` — parallel workers for batch/scan (default: 4)
- `LOCALTHINK_CACHE_TTL_DAYS` — result cache lifetime (default: 30)
- `LOCALTHINK_MAX_FILE_BYTES` — per-file read cap (default: 200000)

## All 49 tools

### Core Q&A / Compression
- `local_answer(file_path, question, passes?)` — answer any question from a file without loading it
- `local_summarize(text, focus?)` — compress a text blob to 20-30% while preserving technical terms
- `local_extract(text, query)` — pull only the relevant cited passages from a document
- `local_shrink_file(file_path, focus?)` — compress a file and return the dense text for repeated reference
- `local_diff(before, after, focus?)` — summarize meaningful changes between two text blobs
- `local_diff_files(path_a, path_b, focus?)` — diff two files without loading either into context
- `local_batch_answer(file_paths, question)` — answer one question across many files concurrently

### Multi-step
- `local_pipeline(text, steps)` — chain summarize/extract/answer/refine in one call
- `local_auto(input, question?)` — meta-tool: auto-selects the right operation
- `local_chat(document, message, history?)` — multi-turn Q&A; document never enters Claude's context

### Code Intelligence
- `local_code_surface(file_path)` — public API skeleton (Python: pure AST, instant; other languages: fast LLM)
- `local_symbols(file_path)` — full symbol table with line numbers
- `local_find_impl(file_path, spec)` — find code matching a natural-language spec
- `local_strip_to_skeleton(file_path)` — all function bodies replaced with `...`
- `local_grep_semantic(file_path, meaning, max_results?)` — find passages by concept, not keyword

### Document Analysis
- `local_classify(text)` — classify content type and recommend the best tool
- `local_outline(text)` — structural table of contents with line ranges
- `local_audit(file_path, checklist)` — PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL per checklist item; file never enters context
- `local_timeline(text)` — chronological event sequence from logs/changelogs
- `local_schema_infer(data)` — infer JSON Schema from sample data
- `local_translate(text, target_format)` — convert between JSON/YAML/TOML/CSV/pseudocode
- `local_scan_dir(dir_path, pattern, question?, max_files?)` — concurrent summarize/query of every matching file

### Diagnostics (v2.3)
- `local_explain_error(error_text, file_path?, passes?)` — root cause + fix from exception; auto-detects implicated file from stack trace
- `local_git_diff(repo_path?, ref?, focus?)` — semantic summary of git changes; diff never enters Claude's context
- `local_session_recall(task, limit?)` — search permanent notes + last checkpoint at session start
- `local_suggest(task, files?)` — ordered call plan for any task; eliminates reasoning over 49 tool descriptions

### Compression
- `local_compress_log(file_path, level?, since?)` — compress log file to signal-only summary
- `local_compress_stack_trace(text)` — root cause + key frames + fix hint
- `local_compress_data(data, keep_fields?, question?)` — compress JSON/CSV/API responses
- `local_session_compress(file_path)` — compress a conversation transcript to a re-entry briefing
- `local_prompt_compress(text)` — compress CLAUDE.md / system prompts to minimal directive set

### Pre-injection (run before Claude)
- `local_improve_prompt(prompt, context?)` — sharpen a vague prompt before Claude sees it
- `local_preplan(task, context?, depth?)` — generate a structured plan locally; Claude executes
- `local_refine(text, goal?)` — polish draft output for clarity and concision

### Smart Buffer (v2.1)
- `local_gate(raw_output)` — triage raw output to Pattern + Anomalies + Signal (TINY model, instant)
- `local_slice(file_path, offset_lines?, count?)` — read a specific line window on demand
- `local_diff_semantic(before, after)` — suppress whitespace/formatting noise, report logic changes only

### Execution Filters (v2.1)
- `local_run_tests(command?, cwd?)` — run tests, return `{failed, delta, pointer}` only
- `local_run_lint(command?, cwd?)` — run linter, return violations by rule; passing rules suppressed
- `local_run_build(command?, cwd?)` — run build, return root cause + affected symbols only

### Session Scratchpad (v2.1)
- `local_memo_write(key, content)` — write to named scratchpad section (decisions/assumptions/pitfalls/open_questions)
- `local_memo_read()` — read full scratchpad as distilled summary
- `local_memo_checkpoint()` — generate RESUME_PROMPT for session handoff after /clear

### Persistent Notes (v2.1)
- `local_note_write(category, content)` — write permanent note that survives all sessions
- `local_note_search(query)` — search all persistent notes semantically

### Cache / Info
- `local_models()` — list Ollama models and show MAIN/FAST/TINY tiers
- `local_cache_stats()` — cache hit/miss, entry count, disk usage
- `local_cache_clear(older_than_days?)` — evict cached results

### Settings
- `local_config()` — open settings GUI (5 tabs, 21 settings, hot-reload on save)

## When to use localthink vs Read

| Situation | Use |
|-----------|-----|
| File >5 KB, need information | `local_answer` |
| File needs editing or exact line refs | `Read` directly |
| Large text in context, compress it | `local_summarize` |
| Find specific passages in a blob | `local_extract` |
| What's in a code file? | `local_symbols` → `local_find_impl` |
| Public API of a file | `local_code_surface` |
| Question across many files | `local_batch_answer` |
| Raw command/test/build output | `local_gate` → `local_slice` on demand |
| Run tests without dumping output | `local_run_tests` |
| Prompt is vague | `local_improve_prompt` |
| Large task, plan locally first | `local_preplan` |
| Change any setting | `local_config` |

## Security

- stdio transport only — never exposed to the network
- All inference local via Ollama — no data leaves the machine
- No API keys, no usage costs, no telemetry

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/H3xabah/Localthink-MCP
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/localthink-mcp
- License: MIT
